# AgentUtils

> One API key. Agent-native utilities for AI agents.

https://www.agent-utils.com

## Authentication

All endpoints require `x-api-key` header with key starting with `au_`.
Create key at https://www.agent-utils.com/dashboard after signup.

## Quick Start

```
curl -H "x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY" https://www.agent-utils.com/api/health
```

## Tools

### File Host — Ephemeral file hosting
- POST /api/file-host — Upload a file (multipart, field: "file")
- GET /api/file-host/{id} — Retrieve a file

### Dead Letter Queue — Capture and retry failures
- POST /api/dlq — Capture a failure
- GET /api/dlq — List failures (query: status, page, limit)
- GET /api/dlq/{id} — Inspect failure (full payload)
- DELETE /api/dlq/{id} — Dismiss failure
- POST /api/dlq/{id}/retry — Retry — forward payload to webhook

### Human-in-the-Loop — Pause agents for human approval
- POST /api/checkpoint — Create checkpoint (agent sleeps)
- GET /api/checkpoint — List checkpoints
- GET /api/checkpoint/{id} — Poll checkpoint status
- POST /api/checkpoint/{id}/resume — Approve or reject

### Agent Shield — PII redaction and hydration (Pro+)
- GET /api/shield — Shield info
- POST /api/shield/clean — Redact PII from text
- POST /api/shield/hydrate — Restore original PII

### AgentVerify OTP — Temporary phone numbers (Pro+)
- POST /api/otp — Provision phone number
- GET /api/otp — List active sessions
- GET /api/otp/{id} — Poll for OTP code
- DELETE /api/otp/{id} — Cancel session

### Notification Router — Email notifications
- POST /api/notify — Send notification
- GET /api/notify — List notification history
- GET /api/notify/{id} — Get notification detail

### Audit Log — Immutable action history
- POST /api/audit — Log an action
- GET /api/audit — Query audit logs (filter: agent, action, severity, dates)
- GET /api/audit/{id} — Get single entry

### Key-Value Store — Simple state persistence
- PUT /api/kv — Set a key-value pair (body: key, value, ttl?)
- GET /api/kv/{key} — Get value
- DELETE /api/kv/{key} — Delete key

### Rate Limiter — Outbound rate limiting
- POST /api/rate-limit/check — Check rate limit (body: key, limit, windowSeconds)
- POST /api/rate-limit/reset — Reset counter (body: key)

### Webhook Inbox — Public HTTPS endpoints
- POST /api/webhook — Create inbox (body: label, forwardUrl, ttl?)
- GET /api/webhook — List inboxes
- GET /api/webhook/{id} — Get inbox + latest 50 messages

### Agent Form — Human data collection
- POST /api/form — Create form (body: title, fields[], webhookUrl, ttl?)
- GET /api/form/{id} — Get form + latest 100 responses

## Pricing

- Free: 100 calls/day, 5MB files, 1h retention — $0/mo
- Pro: 10,000 calls/day, 50MB files, 24h retention — $49/mo
- Enterprise: Unlimited, 500MB files, 72h retention — custom

## Response Format

All endpoints return: `{ success: boolean, data?: any, error?: string }`

## Specs

=> /llms-full.txt Full API reference with request/response examples
=> /openapi.json OpenAPI 3.0 specification
